name: python3-smbc
title: python3-smbc
summary: Python 3 bindings for the Samba client library
description:
Python 3 bindings for the Samba client library
This package contains an extension that allows one to write Python 3 programs
that can talk to SMB/CIFS servers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-smbc because Python 3 bindings for the Samba client library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-smbc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-smbc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-smbc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
